query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.description,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_body_type,
  c.vehicle_color,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
WHERE c.description ILIKE '%school%'
   OR c.description ILIKE '%mandava%'
   OR c.description ILIKE '%high%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
